title: Save and resume last-read page after reopening the same book
description: Verifies page navigation updates the saved reading position and reopening the same book resumes to the last-read page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to upload a book
Select a valid .pdf file in the native file picker
Click the control to open the Library view
Click the uploaded book to open it for reading
Advance to the next page
Advance to the next page
Navigate to /
Click the control to open the Library view
Click the same book to open it for reading
Verify the reader opens on a later page rather than the first page

title: Upload a valid PDF and add it to the library
description: Verifies a first-time user can upload a valid .pdf from the dashboard and receives confirmation that it was added to the local library.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to upload a book
Select a valid .pdf file in the native file picker
Verify an upload success confirmation is visible
Click the control to open the Library view
Verify the newly uploaded book is listed in the library

title: Open a book from the library into the reader
description: Verifies a user can upload a PDF, open the library list, select the book, and see it loaded in the reader interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to upload a book
Select a valid .pdf file in the native file picker
Click the control to open the Library view
Click the newly uploaded book to open it for reading
Verify the reader interface is displayed with PDF content rendered

title: Persist last-read page across a browser refresh mid-read
description: Verifies refreshing the app while reading does not lose the saved page position and reopening the book resumes correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to upload a book
Select a valid .pdf file in the native file picker
Click the control to open the Library view
Click the uploaded book to open it for reading
Advance to the next page
Advance to the next page
Navigate to /
Click the control to open the Library view
Click the same book to open it for reading
Verify the reader opens on the previously reached page rather than resetting to the first page

title: Persist library across app reload and reopen book
description: Verifies a previously uploaded book remains in the library after a page reload and can be opened again from the library.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to upload a book
Select a valid .pdf file in the native file picker
Navigate to /
Click the control to open the Library view
Verify the previously uploaded book is listed in the library
Click the listed book to open it for reading
Verify the reader interface is displayed with PDF content rendered

title: Reject non-PDF upload with validation feedback
description: Verifies uploading a non-.pdf from the dashboard is prevented and a clear validation message is shown without adding a book to the library.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to upload a book
Select a non-.pdf file in the native file picker
Verify a file-type validation message is visible
Click the control to open the Library view
Verify the library does not show a newly added book from this upload attempt

title: Intercept Ctrl+F to search within the PDF and highlight matches
description: Verifies Ctrl+F opens the in-reader search UI, a term can be searched, and matches are highlighted within the rendered PDF.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to upload a book
Select a valid .pdf file in the native file picker
Click the control to open the Library view
Click the uploaded book to open it for reading
Press Ctrl+F
Fill a common search term into the in-document search field
Verify search matches are highlighted within the PDF

title: Open the library from the dashboard and view stored books
description: Verifies the user can navigate from the dashboard to the library and see books loaded from browser storage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the Library view
Verify the library list is displayed
Verify the library view shows either saved books or an empty state

title: Show no-results feedback for in-document search
description: Verifies searching for a term with no matches shows a clear no-results message in the reader search experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to upload a book
Select a valid .pdf file in the native file picker
Click the control to open the Library view
Click the uploaded book to open it for reading
Press Ctrl+F
Fill a highly unlikely search term into the in-document search field
Verify a no-results message is visible

title: Display multiple uploaded books in the library
description: Verifies uploading multiple PDFs results in multiple entries shown in the library list so the user can choose among them.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to upload a book
Select a valid .pdf file in the native file picker
Click the control to upload a book
Select another valid .pdf file in the native file picker
Click the control to open the Library view
Verify multiple books are listed in the library

title: Dashboard visual experience does not block primary actions
description: Verifies the immersive dashboard elements load while the user can still access upload and library actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify an immersive background experience is displayed
Verify a rotating or randomized quote is displayed
Click the control to open the Library view
Verify the library view is displayed
